factors: CCI 48/288 both neutral — no extreme momentum
Close within BB288 2σ band — contained volatility context
US10Y elevated (>=4%) — yield context supportive for USD
Volatility contained (VIX low) — calm risk environment
Gold and USDJPY both firming — cross-asset risk-on/off tension
US-JP 10Y spread unavailable (JP yields placeholder) — incomplete FX-rates context
DXY not in dataset — USD-strength cross-check unavailable
Few conflicts and contained volatility — steadier risk context

supporting_factors: CCI 48/288 both neutral — no extreme momentum
Close within BB288 2σ band — contained volatility context
US10Y elevated (>=4%) — yield context supportive for USD
Volatility contained (VIX low) — calm risk environment
Few conflicts and contained volatility — steadier risk context
conflicting_factors: Gold and USDJPY both firming — cross-asset risk-on/off tension
